name: 閨蜜真面目揭露
description: 多年閨蜜被揭露是調包嬰兒的元兇，連當年的救命之恩都是假的。多層反轉讓衝擊力層層疊加：不僅是壞人，還是換嬰元兇，連恩情都是偽造的。

examples.drama_title: 💔Reborn! Family listened to my inner thoughts, scheming girl cry!#chinesedrama
examples.excerpt: I never intended to save you back then. / Fu Xintong, you're really stupid! / I just had my eye on your bracelet. / The kind little girl who saved me back then / How did she become such a vicious person?
